name: ecomseer
tagline: ClawHub (160★): TikTok Shop e-commerce data assistant. Search products, find trending items, analyze influencers, explore shops, track vide
verdict: Strong quality score and clean security. The only real gaps are housekeeping: no version or changelog to track updates, and no stated "NOT for" boundary — worth adding since this is otherwise a well-built skill.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language appears anywhere in the description or body; grep for 'not for', 'out of scope', 'instead use' finds nothing.
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
